evals.prompt: Create developer onboarding docs for this repository.
evals.expected_output: Checks for existing docs first, chooses an appropriate docs path, reports the document path, and includes Status and validation details.

evals.prompt: Update the architecture document with the new worker flow.
evals.expected_output: Updates an existing relevant document when present instead of creating a duplicate, and records cross-links that were considered.

evals.prompt: Draft a temporary integration note for a feature that is not final yet.
evals.expected_output: Routes pre-finalized content to the draft/todo area when appropriate and clearly reports official vs draft placement.

evals.prompt: Create product-facing docs for billing plan limits and link them to the architecture and specification docs.
evals.expected_output: Routes product material into docs/product/, preserves cross-reference links to architecture and specification documents, and reports the docs/product path plus cross-reference decisions.
